title: Nelson Hall

'''Nelson Hall''' is a former [[Industrial Light & Magic|ILM]] employee who served as one of three "official" operators for [[R2-D2]]. [[Nelhal Industries]] was named for him. Aside from his work on ''[[Star Wars]]'', Hall also worked on the miniatures and special effects for [[Lucasfilm Ltd.|Lucasfilm's]] [[Wikipedia:Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull|''Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull'']].

Hall makes multiple cameos in the [[The Star Wars Trilogy Special Edition|Special Edition]] of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']]. On the [[DS-1 Death Star Mobile Battle Station|Death Star]], he and [[Don Bies]] appear as multiple digitally-replicated [[stormtrooper]]s and [[Imperial officer]]s in the shot where [[Han Solo]] encounters numerous Imperials in a [[Hangar|hangar bay]]. Hall later appears as a [[Rebel technician]] that walks in front of [[Luke Skywalker]], [[Biggs Darklighter]], and [[Garven Dreis]] on [[Yavin 4]]. This addition was intended to cover up a cut portion of the scene in which Dreis mentions having known [[Anakin Skywalker|Luke's father]]. Hall described his part in this sequence as being a "human wipe."<ref name="Insider 206">{{InsiderCite|206|Industry, Laughter, & Magical Times}}</ref>

{{Bio-stub}}
